task_title: Run pipe-04, review skips, remediate what you can

scores.justification: The final report proposes distinct, product-specific remediations: for p044, update the SKU to include the correct prefix (e.g., WD-SKU-0044); for p077, fix the source feed or manually update the price_cents value—not generic 'fix them all' language.
